title: Reviewer Artifact v1
description: Structured output produced by a single reviewer role in the review pipeline. This is the internal contract between reviewers and the read-only judge stage that aggregate.mjs implements. The judge consumes ONLY these artifacts; it never reads PR comments or PR Reviews. Reviewers are responsible for ingesting inline PR comments via `gh api` and folding any blocking change requests into `blocking_issues[]` with `source: "inline_comment"`. See docs/agentic-pipeline-learnings.md §1.4 + §1.5 for the full contract.

source.description: How this blocker was discovered. `inline_comment` means the reviewer ingested a human inline comment per pipeline rule 1.5.

id.description: Should match the id of a blocking_issues[] or non_blocking_notes[] entry when this suggestion addresses one.

followup_issues.description: Tightly-scoped follow-up issues to auto-create on PR merge. Reviewers must keep these well-scoped; loose scoping risks an issue/PR loop.

summary_metadata.description: Optional diagnostics emitted by reviewer roles that post-process the LLM's raw output (e.g., the security orchestrator's merger). Reviewer roles that emit raw LLM output are not required to populate this.

merged_from.description: Roles of the source artifacts this artifact was merged from. Empty/absent for non-merged reviewer artifacts.

truncated_blocking_count.description: Blocking findings dropped by the per-cycle cap before this artifact was written.

truncated_nonblocking_count.description: Non-blocking findings dropped by the per-cycle cap before this artifact was written.

dropped_count.description: Findings dropped by exclusion-list filtering before the cap was applied.

demoted_count.description: Findings demoted from blocking to non-blocking (e.g., confidence below the orchestrator's blocking threshold).
